'''Anselm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

==Biography==
Although he had no military experience or combat training, Anselm joined the Alliance Fleet after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] ravaged his [[Baffop|homeworld]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], and rose to the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] due to his technical expertise. At that battle, he served as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] technician. He often refused to carry a weapon, even in dangerous circumstances, unless directly ordered to do so. He went on to serve in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. He was the head technician for the team (including [[Tomrus]], [[Shen (technician)|Shen]], and [[Kline]]) that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] brought along to the [[Katana fleet]].<ref name="DFRSP" />
